principle: Northstar turns human-owned intent into constrained, verifiable, and compounding action without transferring final accountability to an Agent.
purpose: Link one human-owned goal to immutable work nodes, task-level Grants, verified evidence, decision projections, and governed improvement candidates.

invariants: A work node maps to one immutable work order at a time.
A refinement or retry creates a new task and references the prior node evidence.
A child node may only receive a Broker-issued Grant whose scope is a strict subset of its parent Grant.
A node cannot move to completed from an Agent status message alone.

compounding_loop.production_rule: A candidate cannot modify production policy, permissions, prompts, routing, or tool access before every required gate passes.

global_invariants: The Broker remains the authority for Grant issuance, revocation, budget enforcement, verification recording, and final task state.
Agent-to-Agent direct communication remains prohibited; sub-delegation is Broker-mediated only.
Projections are rebuildable read models over append-only events and cannot overwrite event history.
Business systems remain systems of record; Northstar stores governed references and receipts rather than unrestricted copies of enterprise data.
A failed, frozen, or rejected node preserves its evidence and handling owner.
